title: Hadean Breathe
description: Several powerful bosses from Nether have been added.
body:
# Background Story

At the dawn of civilization in the Overworld, the war brought by the Nether Lord had already spread throughout the Nether.

He had three loyal but ruthless generals: one excelled in close combat and heavy weapons, another was skilled in cavalry charges and firearms, and the last had a strong affinity for shields and heavy armor.
After unifying the Nether, the tyranny of the three generals and their king plunged the Nether into misery, eventually forcing the native inhabitants to unite and rebel.

In the end, the residents overthrew the oppressive rule. The Nether Lord disappeared, and his three generals were defeated, reduced to remnant spirits now lurking in a corner of the Nether, awaiting new explorers.

# Content Overview

**This mod is in mid-stage development and currently adds to the game:**

- A powerful boss-level mob: the Hadean Enforcer,
- A powerful weapon: the Ember.

# Future Plans

**The mod will add in the near or future:**

- The second and third bosses,
- More skills for the existing boss,
- More unique boss materials, weapons, and armor,
- Boss summoning methods and structures,
- Structures, items, and equipment related to the background story.

# Notes

**Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/P9jVXCS8AS**

1.Before loading the mod, be sure to add the prerequisite mod [VzlingLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/vzlinglib) and use its latest version to avoid game crashes.

2.The mod currently can be played normally in survival mode. The current development progress only supports boss challenges or boss battles.

3.This mod allows others to include it in modpacks or for server use, but no one may claim the mod as their own in any form.
